title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBL Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBL Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with RBL Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About RBL Bank:
RBL Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank!
